title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 90.650 - Zoological park — protective ordinances
text:
90.650.  Zoological park — protective ordinances. — The legislative authority of said city shall have power to enact ordinances imposing suitable penalties for the punishment of persons committing injury upon said zoological park or the grounds or collections or property thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 15372) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7617; 1919 § 9016
